calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-445-only commit-intent existence falsifier (regime-scoped, M2): 12 seeds, weak/strong-natural-commit classified from OFF-arm committed fraction, commit-intent counter scored only on the weak (in-regime) subset; MECH-446 gate dropped
items.note: Move M2 of REE_assembly/evidence/planning/claim_synthesis_MECH-445-446_2026-07-06.md. DECOUPLES the MECH-445 commit-INTENT existence claim from MECH-446 so MECH-445 can advance without waiting on the de-commit-release substrate. Based on v3_exq_715 but: (1) 12 seeds; (2) classify each seed weak/strong-natural-commit from its ARM_ENTRY_OFF F-driven committed fraction (weak iff committed_frac<=0.15); (3) score the refractory-independent commit-intent counter (sd034_n_closure_commit_intent) ONLY on the guard-passing WEAK (in-regime) subset, PASS if >0 on >=2/3 of THOSE; (4) MECH-446 co-occurrence / within-arm around-closure occupancy-drop gate DROPPED ENTIRELY. use_closure_commit_entry ON (ARM_ENTRY_ON). Fixes the 715 test-power hole: a 3-seed/2-of-3 gate (~1 in-regime) cannot certify a regime-scoped claim; 12 seeds (~4 in-regime) can. RE-DERIVE BRAKE RELEASED: MECH-445 has 6 prior substrate_ceiling autopsies (460h/i/j/k/l, 715) but (a) the named upstream substrate use_closure_commit_entry is BUILT+VALIDATED (V3-EXQ-460o/460p PASS 2026-06-24, present in ree_core/agent.py) and (b) this is a test-power redesign, not a same-selector de-commit-MAGNITUDE re-derive (the MECH-446 magnitude face the brake protects is dropped) -- brake-safe per claim_synthesis Sec.6. Does NOT supersede 715 (715 remains the MECH-446/co-occurrence record). Mint: in-run self-mint of the ARM_ENTRY_OFF baseline (arm_cell, reuse-eligible); separate dedicated baseline mint SKIPPED -- disqualifier #2 (substrate genuinely in flux for this lineage: the OFF path re-tunes as the f_dominance_conversion_ceiling amend lands). experiment_purpose=evidence. PROMOTES NOTHING (MECH-445 stays candidate/v3_pending/pending_retest_after_substrate until reviewed + /governance applies). Smoke --dry-run PASS 2026-07-06 (regime classifier verified: seed 42 committed_frac 0.353 -> strong, correctly excluded).
items.machine_affinity_note: prefer cloud (linux-x86_64-py3.10); yield logic + scaler wake cloud workers to claim before DLAPTOP-4.local. No hardware requirement.

items.title: SD-MEL-CONSUMER validation: does accumulated waking MEL drive adaptive sleep cadence? (INV-050 third/learning-demand drive; MECH-180). 4 graded-novelty arms consumer-ON + 1 matched-novelty consumer-OFF control; DV=cumulative_sws_writes+rem_rollouts (the V3-EXQ-677 pinned DV) + mel_duration_factor
items.machine_affinity_note: prefer cloud (linux-x86_64-py3.10); yield logic + scaler wake cloud workers to claim before DLAPTOP-4.local. No hardware requirement.
items.note: SUBSTRATE-READINESS VALIDATION of the SD-MEL-CONSUMER landing (ree-v3 main 909292c; ree_core/sleep/mel_consumer.py; /implement-substrate 2026-07-07). experiment_purpose=diagnostic; claim_ids=[INV-050, MECH-180]; PROMOTES NOTHING. Tests whether the now-built MEL consumer makes accumulated waking MEL (mean per-step e3 prediction error) drive offline-phase DURATION: sws_consolidation_steps->sws_n_writes and rem_attribution_steps->rem_n_rollouts scaled by clamp(1+mel_gain*(mel/ref-1),0.5,3.0). Un-pins the exact V3-EXQ-677 DV (SWS=80/REM=60 zero cross-arm variance was scheduler-pinned). DESIGN: recon-only P0 converged base (frozen-probe conv_rel_drop readiness gate; template=701c) + reference calibrated to the stable-base e3 MEL (NOT the ~7x-larger random-action frozen-probe PE); 4 graded-novelty arms (NONE/LOW/MED/HIGH via env drift) consumer-ON + 1 HIGH-novelty consumer-OFF control (reproduces 677 pinning). Sleep fired via SleepLoopManager.force_cycle (SLEEP DRIVER: manual-cycle-loop) with per-step agent.update_residue so MEL accumulates -- NOT run_sleep_cycle() direct (677 bypassed the consumer that way). PASS: DV monotone non-decreasing NONE<=LOW<=MED<=HIGH + HIGH>=NONE*1.15 on >=2/3 seeds (C1 load-bearing) AND OFF pinned + ON-HIGH>OFF-HIGH (C2); relative spread gate, floor recalibrated to 1e-6 (NOT the mis-scaled 1e-4). 3-branch NO-weakens map: readiness-unmet->substrate_not_ready_requeue; C1+C2 PASS->mel_drives_adaptive_sleep_cadence (supports; /governance clears INV-050 retest + MECH-180 v3_pending); C1 FAIL->mel_does_not_modulate_cadence (non_contributory). RE-DERIVE BRAKE RELEASED: INV-050 has >=2 non_contributory autopsies (701/701a/701b/701c) but the named upstream substrate SD-MEL-CONSUMER LANDED 2026-07-07 (failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-701c_2026-06-30 recommended exactly this consumer) and this tests a DIFFERENT question (functional sufficiency) on newly-built substrate -- not another measurability letter. Mint: in-run self-mint (arm_cell reuse-eligible, fresh independent agent per cell). Smoke --dry-run PASS 2026-07-07 (mechanism LIVE: factor varies with MEL, HIGH_ON DV 37 > HIGH_OFF DV 30, OFF pinned cnt_var=0; C1 monotonicity noisy only at dry-run scale as expected).
